description: Aboard Zephyr One, Enoch is startled to find that May has disappeared from her medical bed. He expresses both frustration and concern at his failure to monitor her, realizing that a new problem has just arisen for the team, and the emotional beats of the episode close on this uncertain note.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Oh, dear. Agent May. It is I, Enoch... sentient Chronicom, trusted friend. I am here to help. How could you lose her? You had one job, Enoch. One job...
